subject: [HOLMES] Updated the Version of Holmes Containers
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Updated the Version of Holmes Containers

Bumped the version of docker images to 1.3.0

Change-Id: I075d62c72ffd2303372213e24590f85125efd484
Issue-ID: HOLMES-409
Signed-off-by: GuangrongFu <fu.guangrong@zte.com.cn>
